messages.content: Hello! I am glad to have the opportunity to speak with you about how public goods and services are delivered today. I am interested in your views in your own words. When you think about how public goods and services are delivered today - such as infrastructure, welfare benefits, permits, tax administration, or IT systems - what are the main considerations that come to mind? Please do not hesitate to ask if anything is unclear.
Could you tell me more about what makes you feel they are unfair?
